basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) Recruitment 2026: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 0 Lab Attendant posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Lab Attendant: Up to 30 Years (may be relaxed on experience basis)

qualification.details: Lab Attendant: H.S.C. (Biology) pass from recognized board/University/Institute. One year of experience is Preferred.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Lab Attendant. This is a contract-based position at ACTREC.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Lab Attendant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed H.S.C. (Biology) from a recognized board, university, or institute. One year of experience is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Lab Attendant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 30 years. This limit may be relaxed based on relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Lab Attendant role?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary for the Lab Attendant position ranges from ₹21,510/- p.m. to ₹25,000/- p.m.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Lab Attendant post?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to report at the specified venue on the interview date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. What is the date and time for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 25th May 2026, and candidates should report between 10:00 a.m. and 10:30 a.m.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the venue for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The venue is the 3rd floor, Meeting Room, PS-306, Paymaster Shodhika, TMC-ACTREC, Sec-22, Kharghar, Navi Mumbai- 410210.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry their Bio-data, recent passport size photograph, scanned copies of Aadhaar Card, PAN CARD, and ORIGINAL as well as self-attested copies of qualification mark sheets, certificates, and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.
